title: The People's Book
chapters: Once upon a time, in a land far away, there lived a group of brave adventurers...
Once upon a time, in a land far away, there lived a group of brave adventurers who dreamed of writing the greatest story ever told...

He hadn't spoken to his brother in eleven years, but the letter he found in their father's will changed everything..."

The old map she found in the library basement showed a path that no one had walked for centuries. It led deep into the forest, beyond the forgotten ruins, to a place that existed only in whispered legends.
